fields.name: No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the involved entry or record, according to the specified number series.

fields.name: Starting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the starting date for a time sheet.

fields.name: Ending Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the ending date for a time sheet.

fields.name: Resource No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the resource for the time sheet.

fields.name: Resource Name
fields.tooltip: Specifies the name of the resource for the time sheet.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description for the time sheet.

fields.name: Open Exists
fields.tooltip: Specifies if there are time sheet lines with the status Open.

fields.name: Submitted Exists
fields.tooltip: Specifies if there are time sheet lines with the status Submitted.

fields.name: Rejected Exists
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether there are time sheet lines with the status Rejected.

fields.name: Approved Exists
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether there are time sheet lines with the status Approved.

fields.name: Posted Exists
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether there are time sheet lines with the status Posted.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total number of hours that are registered on the time sheet.

fields.name: Comment
fields.tooltip: Specifies that a comment about this document has been entered.

fields.name: Quantity Open
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of hours for the time sheet with status Open.

fields.name: Quantity Submitted
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of hours for the time sheet with status Submitted.

fields.name: Quantity Approved
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of hours for the time sheet with status Approved.

fields.name: Quantity Rejected
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of hours for the time sheet with status Rejected.
